mnemonics.title: Functional Elements Sequence
mnemonics.content: GHOST PD - Generation → Handling → Organization (Collection) → Storage → Transfer → Processing → Disposal

mnemonics.title: Waste Hierarchy Order
mnemonics.content: PRERP - Prevention → Reuse → Recycling → Energy Recovery → Disposal

mnemonics.title: SWM Objectives
mnemonics.content: PEEH - Protect environment, Ensure health, Economic viability, Sustainability

acronyms.usage: The overall discipline dealing with waste collection, treatment, and disposal
Plant for sorting and processing recyclable materials
Combined mechanical and biological waste processing technique
Fuel produced from waste materials for energy recovery
Test to determine if waste is hazardous
Process of generating energy from waste incineration

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a flowchart showing waste flowing from left to right: Generation → Handling → Collection → Transfer → Processing → Disposal, with each box connected by arrows showing waste movement
Draw a pyramid with Prevention at top (smallest but most important), then Reuse, Recycling, Recovery, and Disposal at base (largest but least preferred)
Draw layers from bottom: compacted clay liner, drainage layer, Leachate collection pipe, compacted waste layer, daily cover soil, and gas vent pipes going up
Show waste coming in from small trucks on one side, being dumped into a pit, and loaded onto larger trailers on the other side for transport

analogies.analogy: Like a factory assembly line where each station performs a specific task before passing the product to the next station
Like the food pyramid - the top (prevention) is what you want most, but you need all levels to function
Like tea brewing - as water passes through waste, it extracts chemicals just like hot water extracts tea flavor
Like sorting laundry into whites, colors, and delicates before washing - makes processing easier and more effective
Like a bus depot where passengers transfer from smaller local buses to larger interstate coaches for efficient long-distance travel
